getAddress() - Method in class Customer
Gets the customer's street address.

Gets the customer's age.

Reads all customer's MongoDB information.

Reads all customers from the Customers table.

Returns the MongoDB collection used for storing customers.

Creates and returns a Connection to the MySQL database.

Gets the customer's email.

Gets the customer's first name.

Returns the customer id.

Gets the customer's last name.

Gets the customer's membership level.

Gets the customer's phone number.
